body:
The new Ollama matrix row documents native `/api/chat`, `/api/generate`, and `/api/ps` as signals Fizeau can observe today, but the current provider still routes through the OpenAI-compatible `/v1` wrapper only, so the mapping is not accurate against the codebase.

The bead is already satisfied by existing documentation. The provider-signal matrix maps Ollama request timing to native `/api/chat` and `/api/generate`, inventory/context signals to `/api/ps`, documents the fresh/unknown fallback behavior, and explicitly calls out the missing live utilization probe as a follow-up bead.
